canonical_title: stale queue backlog の再調整方針を board 論点化する
canonical_summary: waiting_auth / waiting_manual_review の stale backlog を、単発棚卸しではなく board 裁定済みの triage policy と follow-up 導線に変える候補。
root_issue: stale queue backlog に対する board-approved triage / closure / reopen ルールがまだ無く、auth recovery 後も queue が自動で健全化しない。
desired_change: board で backlog triage policy を定義し、safe-close / reopen / escalate の分岐基準と follow-up artifact を決める。

canonical_title: stale queue backlog の再調整方針を board 論点化する
canonical_summary: waiting_auth / waiting_manual_review の stale backlog を、単発棚卸しではなく board 裁定済みの triage policy と follow-up 導線に変える候補。

desired_change: board で backlog triage policy を定義し、safe-close / reopen / escalate の分岐基準と follow-up artifact を決める。

canonical_title: Create a dedicated Queue Triage Analyst path for dominant-prefix backlog
canonical_summary: Queue telemetry is stable enough that repeated supervisor-core review loops are lower leverage than a named triage owner with a runbook.
root_issue: Dominant-prefix queue telemetry keeps recurring without an ownerized triage path, so supervision loops are becoming repetitive.
desired_change: Move dominant-prefix remediation to a dedicated Queue Triage Analyst flow with checklist, owner, and success criteria.

canonical_title: Require bundle manifest + dry-run sync before live runtime reflection
canonical_summary: Partial file-by-file reflection between workspace and live runtime is unsafe because the live side still depends on an older contract surface.
root_issue: Live runtime reflection is still vulnerable to contract drift when changes are mirrored file-by-file.
desired_change: Treat runtime reflection as a bundle with manifest, dry-run diff, and backup gates before live sync.

canonical_title: Promote anomaly-delta monitor contract across heartbeat, board, and scorecard prompts
canonical_summary: Routine heartbeat and scorecard output is still drifting toward narrative review; the stable pattern is signal_only for routine runs and agenda_candidate only for anomalies, deltas, and precedent gaps.
root_issue: Heartbeat and scorecard outputs still mix routine digest with governance reasoning, which makes Board noise harder to control.
desired_change: Standardize anomaly-delta monitor prompts so routine runs emit signal_only and only anomalies become agenda candidates.

canonical_title: heartbeat governance snapshot shows board_touch_high and exploration_drift on repeated stale-backlog follow-up
canonical_summary: 24h snapshot shows 2 heartbeat runs, candidate_rate 0.5, candidate_to_board_touch_ratio 2.0, board_touch_high warning, and exploration_drift_risk=true while board_overload/scout_saturation/duplicate_spike remain false.
root_issue: Routine heartbeat cycles are still producing board touches without a signal-only digest baseline, so the monitor is oscillating on the same stale backlog follow-up instead of staying delta-only.
desired_change: Tighten the anomaly-delta monitor contract: keep healthy cycles as digest signal_only, and emit agenda_candidate only when a new metric delta or threshold breach appears.

canonical_title: Split supervisor-core and route dominant-prefix triage to Queue Triage Analyst
canonical_summary: Supervisor-core で重複しやすい観測・triage・品質レビューを分離し、dominant-prefix triage は専任経路へ切り出す。
root_issue: supervisor-core is still absorbing triage work that should be specialized
desired_change: dominant-prefix triage should move to a dedicated Queue Triage Analyst path

canonical_title: Keep routine board / heartbeat / scorecard signal-only and reserve candidates for anomalies
canonical_summary: 定常時の board / heartbeat / scorecard は digest に固定し、candidate 化は anomaly delta があるときだけに絞る。
root_issue: routine monitoring is producing too much governance noise
desired_change: steady-state monitoring should remain signal-only unless there is a real anomaly delta

canonical_title: Require exact-target preflight plus owner/due/success criteria before light-edit or scout handoff escalation
canonical_summary: 軽微修正と scout / PoC の引き渡しを、対象確認と owner/due/success criteria が揃うまで上げない。
root_issue: light edits and scout handoffs are still missing a mandatory preflight gate
desired_change: targets, owners, due dates, and success criteria should be confirmed before escalation

canonical_summary: Supervisor-core で重複しやすい観測・triage・品質レビューを分離し、dominant-prefix triage は専任経路へ切り出す。
root_issue: supervisor-core is still absorbing triage work that should be specialized
desired_change: dominant-prefix triage should move to a dedicated Queue Triage Analyst path

canonical_title: Keep routine board / heartbeat / scorecard signal-only and reserve candidates for anomalies
canonical_summary: 定常時の board / heartbeat / scorecard は digest に固定し、candidate 化は anomaly delta があるときだけに絞る。
root_issue: routine monitoring is producing too much governance noise
desired_change: steady-state monitoring should remain signal-only unless there is a real anomaly delta

canonical_title: Require exact-target preflight plus owner/due/success criteria before light-edit or scout handoff escalation
canonical_summary: 軽微修正と scout / PoC の引き渡しを、対象確認と owner/due/success criteria が揃うまで上げない。
root_issue: light edits and scout handoffs are still missing a mandatory preflight gate
desired_change: targets, owners, due dates, and success criteria should be confirmed before escalation

canonical_title: Direct board runtime write validation candidate
canonical_summary: Validate that board_runtime direct write and assemble paths still function when heartbeat mapping is bypassed.
root_issue: heartbeat to board mapping may be broken
desired_change: verify direct board write path separately

canonical_title: Standardize safe-close records with mandatory owner / next_action / success_criteria / review_after / linked_evidence
canonical_summary: safe-close / reopen の分岐自体はあるが、記録の必須項目が薄く、silent failure と reopen drift を運用上で見分けにくい。close record を構造化して監査可能にする。
root_issue: safe-close / reopen decisions are structurally valid but operationally under-specified, so different operators can read the same close record differently.
desired_change: close records should carry explicit owner, next_action, success_criteria, review_after, and linked_evidence fields.

canonical_title: stale queue backlog の再調整方針を board 論点化する
canonical_summary: waiting_auth / waiting_manual_review の stale backlog を、単発棚卸しではなく board 裁定済みの triage policy と follow-up 導線に変える候補。
root_issue: stale queue backlog に対する board-approved triage / closure / reopen ルールがまだ無く、auth recovery 後も queue が自動で健全化しない。
desired_change: board で backlog triage policy を定義し、safe-close / reopen / escalate の分岐基準と follow-up artifact を決める。

canonical_title: Create a dedicated Queue Triage Analyst path for dominant-prefix backlog
canonical_summary: Queue telemetry is stable enough that repeated supervisor-core review loops are lower leverage than a named triage owner with a runbook.
root_issue: Dominant-prefix queue telemetry keeps recurring without an ownerized triage path, so supervision loops are becoming repetitive.
desired_change: Move dominant-prefix remediation to a dedicated Queue Triage Analyst flow with checklist, owner, and success criteria.

canonical_title: Require bundle manifest + dry-run sync before live runtime reflection
canonical_summary: Partial file-by-file reflection between workspace and live runtime is unsafe because the live side still depends on an older contract surface.
root_issue: Live runtime reflection is still vulnerable to contract drift when changes are mirrored file-by-file.
desired_change: Treat runtime reflection as a bundle with manifest, dry-run diff, and backup gates before live sync.

canonical_title: Promote anomaly-delta monitor contract across heartbeat, board, and scorecard prompts
canonical_summary: Routine heartbeat and scorecard output is still drifting toward narrative review; the stable pattern is signal_only for routine runs and agenda_candidate only for anomalies, deltas, and precedent gaps.
root_issue: Heartbeat and scorecard outputs still mix routine digest with governance reasoning, which makes Board noise harder to control.
desired_change: Standardize anomaly-delta monitor prompts so routine runs emit signal_only and only anomalies become agenda candidates.

canonical_title: heartbeat governance snapshot shows board_touch_high and exploration_drift on repeated stale-backlog follow-up
canonical_summary: 24h snapshot shows 2 heartbeat runs, candidate_rate 0.5, candidate_to_board_touch_ratio 2.0, board_touch_high warning, and exploration_drift_risk=true while board_overload/scout_saturation/duplicate_spike remain false.
root_issue: Routine heartbeat cycles are still producing board touches without a signal-only digest baseline, so the monitor is oscillating on the same stale backlog follow-up instead of staying delta-only.
desired_change: Tighten the anomaly-delta monitor contract: keep healthy cycles as digest signal_only, and emit agenda_candidate only when a new metric delta or threshold breach appears.
